commands.review_summary:
The branch widens the OTEL smoke receiver/scenario to cover traces, metrics, and logs, adds Prometheus and combined observability QA script aliases plus an observability scenario pack, and updates QA/release docs and changelog.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds/expands maintainer QA automation rather than reporting a runtime bug. The review used source inspection and PR diff evidence, not a failing reproduction.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is indicated; the remaining action is maintainer-owned validation of the new QA smoke lane before merge.

target.title: test(diagnostics): widen observability smokes
target.body:
## Summary

- Extends `pnpm qa:otel:smoke` from trace-only proof to OTLP trace, metric, and log request proof.
- Adds `qa:prometheus:smoke`, `qa:observability:smoke`, and a QA-Lab `observability` scenario pack for the existing Prometheus scrape scenario.
- Updates QA/release docs and changelog so diagnostics smoke coverage is discoverable.

## Verification

- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); console.log('package.json ok')"`
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 AUTOREVIEW_OPENCLAW_MAINTAINER_VALIDATION=1 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` (clean before final rebase; same patch shape after rebase)

Behavior addressed: OTel QA smoke previously proved only trace export even though the diagnostics plugin exposes traces, metrics, and logs; Prometheus smoke had a scenario but no first-class runner alias.
Real environment tested: Not completed. Testbox and AWS Crabbox auth are unavailable in this session.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox --shell -- "pnpm qa:observability:smoke"`; `../crabbox/bin/crabbox run --provider aws --shell -- "pnpm qa:observability:smoke"`.
Evidence after fix: Static diff checks and autoreview passed; remote smoke execution is blocked before the command can run.
Observed result after fix: Blacksmith reports `not authenticated`; AWS Crabbox cannot resolve credentials/IMDS role.
What was not tested: `pnpm qa:otel:smoke`, `pnpm qa:prometheus:smoke`, `pnpm qa:observability:smoke`, and `pnpm check:changed` were not run because local pnpm validation is intentionally disallowed and remote runner auth is unavailable.
target.author: vincentkoc
